Vendored official PawnIO module asset.

- Module: AMDFamily17.bin
- Source: https://github.com/namazso/PawnIO.Modules
- Release: 0.2.3
- Release date: 2026-02-25
- Download: https://github.com/namazso/PawnIO.Modules/releases/download/0.2.3/release_0_2_3.zip

This project vendors only the signed PawnIO module binary and its license file.
PawnIOLib.dll and the Microsoft-signed PawnIO driver are not bundled here; the
runtime first checks for a local pawnio/windows/PawnIOLib.dll copy and then
falls back to an installed PawnIO copy under C:\Program Files\PawnIO.
